completion_summary: Completed six fail-closed task-validity cards and a nonclaiming provisional core-4 recommendation; preserved the historical 2/6 publication gate and documented confirmatory rerun requirements.
scope: Build six fail-closed task-validity cards from retained response surfaces and formal trajectories: primary-metric direction, sensitivity, minimum-strategy ordering, failure cases, and evidence-based core-4/core-6 recommendation without rewriting existing results
